response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates over 12 years of full-stack development experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud technologies, closely matching the primary stack. Her work includes building scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and real-time applications, with measurable impact in high-throughput environments. Her open-source contributions, technical leadership, and customer-focused delivery further align with the role's requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in scaling systems and optimizing performance
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership
concerns: No explicit mention of Vitest (testing framework)
Primary focus on backend and full-stack, with less emphasis on frontend UI/UX design
